name: Triple Wheat-Honey Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wheat flakes and water to boiling in a 1-quart saucepan; reduce heat.
2. Cover and simmer about 30 minutes or until liquid is absorbed. Cool for 10 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Spray the bottoms only of 12 medium muffin cups, each measuring 2 1/2" x 1 1/4", with nonstick cooking spray, or line them with paper baking cups.
5. In a large bowl, beat buttermilk, honey, oil, vanilla, and egg whites until combined.
6. Stir in flour, wheat bran, baking powder, baking soda, and salt just until the mixture is moistened.
7. Gently fold in the cooked wheat flakes.
8. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups (the cups will be fairly full).
9. Bake for 22 to 24 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Remove from the pan immediately.
